findings.object: Time Period.Dim Date Sk -> Date.Dim Date Sk
findings.message: Relationship 'Time Period.Dim Date Sk -> Date.Dim Date Sk' uses bidirectional cross-filtering. This creates ambiguous filter paths and can degrade query performance.
findings.fix: Change crossFilteringBehavior to 'oneDirection' unless bidirectional is explicitly required.

ruleResults.impactDescription: Generates additional SQL round-trips for bidirectional filter propagation. Can double the number of queries per visual.
Readability and maintenance issue. No performance impact but increases risk of errors when columns are renamed.
Hidden/unused columns are still included in DirectQuery SQL. Increases read bytes and cost per query.
